name: 16"x8" Sketched Tree in Black Frame Wall Art - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Accentuate the walls of your home or office with this Sketched Tree in Black Frame Wall Art from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This minimalist wall art features a sketched tree art in tones of gray on a paper that adds a calming touch to your space. Designed with a rectangular wooden frame in a black hue, this wall art comes with a sawtooth back to hang it vertically with ease.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
